label: Property
summary: A Property is the physical residential property — the bricks-and-mortar object: a house, a flat, a bungalow, a maisonette.
scopeNote: UFO: Physical Object (Substantial Individual). Identity Criterion: spatial-material continuity, with legal-record-discontinuity override (registry evidence of replacement title).

attributes.label: UPRN
attributes.description: Unique Property Reference Number(s) assigned by OS AddressBase. A single property may bear multiple UPRNs.

attributes.label: Registered title number
attributes.description: HMLR title number, if the property has been registered. Absence does not imply the property does not exist.

relationships.description: Legal estates vested in this property.
Registered titles that document this property at HMLR.

constraints.message: A Property must have at least one address or UPRN to be unambiguously identified.
UPRN, when present, must match the pattern [0-9]{1,12}.
